intro.heading: OUR RECOVERY PACKAGES
intro.text:
Every recovery is different. Our private RN-led services are thoughtfully designed to support your surgeon’s post-operative plan with clinical precision, discretion, and elevated attentiveness.
Private recovery investment begins at $950.

featured.title: OUR RECOVERY PACKAGES
featured.description:
Every recovery is different. Our private RN-led services are thoughtfully designed to support your surgeon’s post-operative plan with clinical precision, discretion, and elevated attentiveness.
Private recovery investment begins at $950.
featured.price_note: All care is delivered by licensed Registered Nurses within RN scope of practice and strictly follows surgeon-directed instructions.

services.title: Base Recovery Support
services.description: Ideal for local patients who have arranged transportation and desire professional post-operative oversight during the initial recovery period.

services.title: Surgical Day Recovery
services.description: Commonly selected for: tummy tuck (abdominoplasty), multi-area liposuction, breast lift, arm lift, chin/neck contouring.

services.title: Signature Recovery
services.description: Elevated same-day recovery support with enhanced one-on-one RN oversight for patients desiring additional reassurance and clinical attentiveness.

services.title: Overnight Recovery Support
services.description: Ideal for local patients who have arranged transportation and desire professional post-operative oversight during the initial recovery period.

services.title: Platinum 24-Hour Recovery
services.description: Hospital-level attentiveness in the comfort of your private setting.

services.title: Extended Luxury Recovery
services.description: Designed for high-acuity procedures or clients traveling without local support.

concierge.title: OPTIONAL CONCIERGE ADD-ONS
concierge.description:
Additional RN hours (4-hour minimum)
Overnight RN extension
Surgery-day RN escort transportation

notes:
Procedure examples are provided for general reference only. Individual recovery needs vary based on patient condition and surgeon protocol.
 All services are provided by licensed Registered Nurses within RN scope of practice. We do not diagnose, prescribe, or alter medical treatment plans.
